title: SmartBracelet Firmware Build Pipeline
description: End-to-end build and validation pipeline for ESP32-S3 smart watch firmware

scan.name: Code Scan
scan.does: Scan source files and build knowledge graph

lint.name: Static Lint
lint.does: Run architecture guard checks and code smells

analyze.name: Hotspot Analysis
analyze.does: Identify high-complexity functions and coupling issues

refactor.name: Refactor
refactor.does: Execute code refactoring based on analysis results

verify.name: Verify Changes
verify.does: Recompile and run guard checks after refactoring

flash.name: Flash Device
flash.does: Upload firmware to ESP32-S3 via serial

deliverable.description: Verified firmware flashed to SmartBracelet device
